productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Dusky Rose Leather Belt
description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing - be it to secure a bottom, or act as a styling detail to tops and trousers. This leather belt from wrangler is set to pump up your style and add wonder to your attire with its two way usability.Length: 86 cm Made of leather for durability and style Can be worn both sides Tang clasp to offer a snug Fit and hold the belt in place Holes to customise fit Rugged brown leather for added style Metal studs embellished at the tail of the belt in the shape of a 'w' CareUse a brass polisher to maintain buckle shineUse a leather conditioner to protect the leather
